title: AU Small Finance Bank Capital India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
company: AU Small Finance Bank Capital India

jsonLd.title: AU Small Finance Bank Capital India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
AU Small Finance Bank Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About AU Small Finance Bank Capital India:
AU Small Finance Bank Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AU Small Finance Bank Capital India!
